prompt: Clinical planning scene for Xeomin treatment of excessive back sweating.
scene: modern med spa exam room with neutral walls and soft clinical lighting
subject: adult patient seated and covered modestly with a drape while provider in gloves marks a precise treatment grid across the upper back
composition: wide horizontal frame, subject centered-left with clean negative space on the right
lighting: soft daylight-balanced clinic lighting, natural skin texture, subtle contrast
constraints: professional clinical setting; no blood; no bruising; no visible logos; no text; no watermark; modest coverage
negative: stock-photo vibe; cheesy lens flare; oversaturated colors; harsh sharpening; clutter

prompt: Step 1 of treatment: mapped zones identified before injections for excessive back sweating.
scene: clean treatment room with neutral background
subject: close-up of upper back with small evenly spaced marker dots defining target sweat zones, provider hand holding skin-safe marker
composition: square frame focused on mapped area, centered composition
lighting: soft overhead clinical light with clear detail
constraints: non-surgical appearance; no blood; no visible face; no logos; no text; no watermark; modest and professional

prompt: Step 2 of treatment: localized Xeomin injections placed in mapped back sweating zones.
scene: same clean treatment room to maintain continuity
subject: close-up of provider in gloves administering precise micro-injections with a fine needle into pre-marked upper-back points
composition: square frame, needle and mapped points in focus, patient comfortably still
lighting: soft neutral clinic lighting with realistic skin texture
constraints: no blood; no bruising; no distress expression; no logos; no text; no watermark; professional medical tone
negative: graphic medical imagery; clutter; oversharpened skin

prompt: Step 3 outcome scene showing improved comfort in daily life after back sweating treatment.
scene: everyday setting such as walking outdoors in light business-casual clothing
subject: adult person moving confidently with dry clothing and relaxed posture, back area remaining dry and comfortable
composition: square frame with subject mid-shot and natural environment softly blurred
lighting: natural daytime light, balanced neutral tones
constraints: no visible sweat marks; no logos; no text; no watermark; realistic and understated
negative: overly staged smile; heavy retouching; dramatic cinematic effects
